ns0:entry.ns0:title: [qml] barry-ran/QuickDesk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/barry-ran/QuickDesk
Language: qml
QuickDesk is the first AI-native remote desktop — an open-source, free application with a built-in MCP (Model Context Protocol) Server that lets any AI agent see and control remote computers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [dart] techjarves/Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/techjarves/Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform
Language: dart
A cross-platform Flutter app that runs uncensored, 100% offline open-source AI models (GGUF) directly on your Android, iOS, or PC. No cloud, no filters, total privacy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [jupyter-notebook] charliedream1/ai_quant_trade
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/charliedream1/ai_quant_trade
Language: jupyter-notebook
股票AI操盘手：从学习、模拟到实盘，一站式平台。包含股票知识、策略实例、大模型、因子挖掘、传统策略、机器学习、深度学习、强化学习、图网络、高频交易、C++部署和聚宽实例代码等，可以方便学习、模拟及实盘交易
